name: Nutty Stuffed Mushrooms^
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the mushrooms and remove the stems by finely chopping them.
2. Sprinkle salt inside the mushroom caps and brush the outside with olive oil.
3. Cook the chopped stems, garlic, and nuts in butter for 3-4 minutes, then turn off the heat.
4. Mix in the stuffing, cheese, and egg; spoon into the caps.
5. Bake at 350°F for 8-10 minutes on an ungreased baking sheet or until thoroughly heated.
